name: Team Ed Markey
subject: This is ⬛️⬛️⬛️⬛️unacceptable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
|
---
[]()

| | | Team - The DOJ's redacted Mueller report is unacceptable. We must stand up and demand the full report.

_**[SIGN ON: Tell the DOJ to release the full, unredacted Mueller report NOW!](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/mueller-report-redacted/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Begin Forward from Ed Markey:
* * *
**ALERT: President Trump 's hand-picked Attorney General released a REDACTED version of the Mueller report today.**

[_**A redacted report is unacceptable. Sign the petition and tell the DOJ to release the full, unredacted Mueller report!**_](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/mueller-report-redacted/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Team,

If the Department of Justice had released a redacted Warren Commission Report, Iran/Contra Report, or the 9/11 Commission Report, it would have been unacceptable.

To get a redacted Mueller report today is just as unacceptable. This is a pivotal moment for our country, and we must know the full truth.

[_**That 's why I'm calling on the DOJ to release the full, unredacted Mueller report. Join me and add your name to our petition. We must demand the whole truth.**_](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/mueller-report-redacted/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This entire process has subverted accountability and transparency.

* Before becoming Attorney General, William Bar wrote a memo criticizing the Mueller investigation.

* Trump then picks Barr to be his new AG.

* Barr issues a laughable summary of Muller's report and declares no wrongdoing.

* Barr briefs the White House on the Mueller report before Congress or the public ever see it.

* And now Barr released a redacted report.

The American people deserve to know the entire contents of the Mueller report. We cannot allow Trump's DOJ to blackout the truth.

[_**Sign the petition and call on the DOJ to release the full, unredacted Mueller report.**_](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/mueller-report-redacted/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks for standing with me,

Ed
---

---

name: Booker Rapid Response Team
subject: The Trump administration published an unsearchable version of the Mueller Report for the public. So we made it searchable →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, After a blatantly partisan press conference this morning to pre-emptively defend the president before the release of the Mueller Report, we finally got to see it. Not only were several pages completely blacked out with redactions, the administration released it as an unsearchable PDF -- something that, with 2019's technology, probably isn't an accident. We found a way to fix that. You can find a [**_searchable copy of the public Mueller Report here_**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc760a/5fca0d19/1ac75b3a/291a86f2/1648368134/VEsH/ "https://www.scribd.com/document/406729844/Mueller-Report"). (Share it far and wide.) As we dig through the report, the attorney general's initial summary looks more and more like part of a partisan cover-up. Mueller's conclusions about what happened in the 2016 election and in the aftermath of the Comey firing are deeply troubling -- and they require a serious review from Congress. **Cory is demanding full transparency, and full accountability -- and he won 't stop until the American people get it. Here's a simple way you can help: [_ADD YOUR NAME to strengthen the power of this public demand_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc760a/5fca0d19/1ac75b3a/291a86f1/1648368134/VEsE/ "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/release-the-report-0417?source=em_pet_20190418").** Thank you -- more as we know it, Booker Rapid Response Team P.S. If you're tired of being misled or straight-up lied to by this administration, channel that energy into something productive. [**_Make a donation to a Democrat who will be unapologetic and bold in the call for Justice for All._**](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/20190418-report-em?refcode=em_x_20190418_BRR_20190418-x-BRR-searchpdf-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") [](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/20190418-report-em?refcode=em_x_20190418_BRR_20190418-x-BRR-searchpdf-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc760a/5fca0d19/1ac75b3a/291a86fd/1648368134/VEsA/ "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc760a/5fca0d19/1ac75b3a/291a86fc/1648368134/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc760a/5fca0d19/1ac75b3a/291a86fb/1648368134/VEsO/ "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc760a/5fca0d19/1ac75b3a/291a86fa/1648368134/VEsP/ "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc760a/5fca0d19/1ac75b3a/291a86fe/1648368134/VEsHBQ/ "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Brad Komar, Team Hickenlooper
subject: Making sure you saw this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
Thanks to you, we got off to a strong start in March, but we need your help to sustain that momentum. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377168f/691c9bd/6ca7d0b2/11a4b5b2/3732120024/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team--making sure you saw this important update from our finance team. We're laying the groundwork for the upcoming months of our campaign right now. And to go the distance, we need your support.

Get caught up below, then [**_chip in to help us start the second quarter strong._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377168f/691c9bd/6ca7d0b2/11a4b5b3/3732120024/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190418_BK_20190418-fr-BK-pedaltopper-nop_nop_l1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks,
Brad
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377168f/691c9bd/6ca7d0b2/11a4b5b0/3732120024/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190418_BK_20190418-fr-BK-pedaltopper-nop_nop_contribbutton1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=") \------------------------------------------------------------------------- Team, we'll keep this short: This is a pivotal moment for our campaign. It's a moment that will decide how we'll be able to compete in the coming months of this primary--and how much momentum we can build for John before the first debates in June.

[**_The second quarter is a critical time for this campaign --can you please make a donation today, to help us take an important step forward on this journey?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377168f/691c9bd/6ca7d0b2/11a4b5b1/3732120024/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190418_BK_20190418-fr-BK-pedaltopper-nop_nop_l2&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks to you, we got off to a strong start in March, but we need your help to sustain that momentum. We need your help to get staff on the ground, open local offices and hire organizers, and get John's vision of progressive, collaborative change out to every zip code and every community possible.

**Team, we cannot take our operation to the next level without you.** Signs, stickers, office rentals, wi-fi and grassroots organizers--none of it comes free. But it's worth it, because it's how we'll get our message out and build support for John all across the country before he takes that debate stage.

[**_Help us ramp up and build a winning campaign across the country by chipping in now._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377168f/691c9bd/6ca7d0b2/11a4b5b1/3732120024/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190418_BK_20190418-fr-BK-pedaltopper-nop_nop_l2&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
Dan

Dan Sorenson
Finance Director
Team Hickenlooper
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377168f/691c9bd/6ca7d0b2/11a4b5ae/3732120024/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-em-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190418_BK_20190418-fr-BK-pedaltopper-nop_nop_contribbutton2&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

** **

| This month the justices will hear [oral arguments in 13 cases](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=WqnSJN-UqkPJD0rrvzw7zpfxwH6pCVCaFEa30IBMq_en40Jb_9S1JInHF1Q6NwTorTfic_mTVgAAUFjxkodl7NdTSCI-odFrmggSMT4mDt132e4cOcKoK6CvLW3wCdPo&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190419com01&n=2), which will conclude all of the oral arguments for this term. The Supreme Court will issue rulings on the nation’s most contested cases, expected by the end of June.
### SUPREME COURT CASE UPDATE FOR APRIL:
Below are three cases worth highlighting for which SCOTUS will hear oral arguments for this month.
#### Case 1: Department of Commerce v. New York
In 2018, Commerce Secretary, Wilbur Ross announced that he would reinstate a citizenship question on the 2020 census. The question was asked from 1820-1950 and re-introduced to the census in 2020 to assist the U.S. Department of Justice ensuring voting rights are not abused. This decision sparked outrage in states across the nation. New York, Maryland and California filed lawsuits claiming the question would violate the Enumeration Clause and the Administrative Procedure Act. Their main concern is that illegal residents in the U.S. would be far less likely to respond to the census and could fear deportation. The census must be finalized and printed in June leaving little time for this legal battle, which prompted the federal government to request the Supreme Court expedite this case without first requiring the appeals courts to hear the case. **The central question in this case:** [Did the district court error in enjoining the secretary of the Department of Commerce from reinstating a question about citizenship to the 2020 decennial census on the ground that the Secretary’s decision violated the Administrative Procedure Act, 5U.S.C. 701 et seq.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=RDRHk6ni7OvEv8Bu9zj6hMVcTktAj198jVo5TgG12F9HwLfqZHrK1GnTJzBsIy_K8pnUJGGWbzBFwE_fMXrTHw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190419com01&n=3)? The Supreme Court will hear oral arguments for this case on April 23, 2019.
#### Case 2: lancu v. Brunetti
This case received extensive attention in recent weeks. Erik Brunetti attempted to register his clothing brand trademark with the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office but was denied because of the vulgar word he was trying to trademark. Brunetti brought the case before the United States Court of Appeals, and the court found that the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office violated his First Amendment rights. In 2017, the Supreme Court ruled on a similar case, Matal v. Tam which also challenged offensive trademarks. In that case, the justices unanimously ruled that the trademark should be allowed. Justice Samuel Alito said, “Speech may not be banned on the ground that it expresses ideas that offend.” The justices will be considering the Lanham Act which prohibits “immoral” or “scandalous” trademarks. The justices, and those in court, struggled not to use vulgar language as they sought to discuss the case in oral arguments. The Deputy Solicitor General referred to Brunetti’s company name as a “profane past participle form of a well-known word of profanity and perhaps the paradigmatic word of profanity in our language." This case speaks to a shift in our culture where vulgar language is becoming more mainstream. **The central question in this case:** [Is section 1052(a)’s prohibition on the federal registration of “immoral” or “scandalous” marks facially invalid under the Free Speech Clause of the First Amendment](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=RDRHk6ni7OvEv8Bu9zj6hC89uydhxqv2K2qtvrUPKj1VpnWcjx6dvtZDU4g1O4K5&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190419com01&n=4)? The Supreme Court heard oral arguments for this case on April 15, 2019.
#### Case 3: McDonough v. Smith
As we quickly approach another presidential election year, this case should draw interest. In New York, under Democratic Commissioner of the Rensselaer County Board of Elections, Edward McDonough alleged fraud took place in a primary election. In 2009, a special prosecutor, Youel Smith, was appointed to investigate. Smith targeted McDonough and allegedly fabricated evidence and faulty DNA analysis. A grand jury indicted McDonough on multiple felonies based on that evidence. The first trial ended in a mistrial and the second, in 2012, resulted in McDonough’s acquittal. In 2015, McDonough filed a lawsuit against Smith claiming falsified evidence was used against him. The Northern District Court of New York and the Second Circuit Court both ruled that the statute of limitations on the case had run out. **The central question in this case:**[Does the statute of limitations for a Section 1983 claim based on fabrication of evidence in criminal proceedings begin to run when those proceedings terminate in the defendant’s favor or when the defendant becomes aware of the tainted evidence and its improper use](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=RDRHk6ni7OvEv8Bu9zj6hLevLOts-fUnxoqQy-zk1ktA8bAG2ro6HYOOAGvtsn4X&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190419com01&n=5)? The Supreme Court heard oral arguments on April 17, 2019.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
This is the campaign that can beat Trump
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1060%2E150750%2ElunIiW)

Friends -
For the first time, Bernie has taken the lead in a national poll:
**_Emerson Polling - April 15, 2019**_
Sanders: 29%
Biden: 24%
Buttigieg: 9%
Harris: 8%
This is a campaign with all the momentum. More than 1 million people have signed up to volunteer. We are a campaign funded almost exclusively by a record number of small-dollar donors. And on April 27, supporters will host more than 5,000 organizing kick-off events.
But our strong start in this race has members of the political and financial establishment plotting against us.
They are already planning a "Stop Sanders" campaign and will spend unlimited amounts of money to try to defeat us. So it's important that our campaign is prepared to take them on and win, which is why we are asking you directly:
[**Make a $3 donation to our campaign and we are going to win this nomination, defeat Trump, and transform this country.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10809?refcode=em190419-1-subjects&t=26&akid=1060%2E150750%2ElunIiW)
We’re off to a great start, but we can’t stop now. We can hold this lead to the end if we don’t let up. So thanks for chipping in.
All my best,
Faiz Shakir
Campaign Manager
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10809?refcode=em190419-1-subjects&t=27&akid=1060%2E150750%2ElunIiW)

In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=1060_150750_lunIiW&akid=1060%2E150750%2ElunIiW).

subject: Mainstream Media Doubles Down on Trump Conspiracies
body:
"Mainstream media coverage of the Russia-collusion story has been dead wrong for two years, yet the effort to smear President Trump continues." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=81a9ff22b2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Mainstream Media Doubles Down on Trump Conspiracies**

“Mainstream media coverage of the Russia-collusion story has been dead wrong for two years, yet the effort to smear President Trump continues — even after Thursday’s release of the Mueller report,” David Harsanyi writes in the _New York Post_.

“In a responsible media environment, journalists who had been misled by their partisan sources for years would be clamoring to find out how the entire country could be plunged into a 22-month-long destabilizing investigation that amounted to nothing more than a now-debunked conspiracy theory . . . Instead, they’re doubling down.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b1302fd76e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump has every right to feel liberated. What the report shows is that he endured a special-counsel probe that was relentlessly, at times farcically, obsessed with taking him out,” Kimberly Strassel writes in _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a414b456c7&e=3ee4985eea)_. “What stands out is just how diligently and creatively the special counsel’s legal minds worked to implicate someone in Trump World on something Russia- or obstruction-of-justice-related. And how—even with all its overweening power and aggressive tactics—it still struck out.”
---
|
---
| “While the Democrats continue to cling to the fantasy that evidence of collusion really is lurking somewhere in the dark recesses of the Mueller report, the report itself makes it clearer than ever what any unbiased observer of the Russia story has been able to see for more than a year: Robert Mueller knew very early on in his investigation that there was no collusion,” former U.S. Attorney Joseph diGenova writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85ffcc0cd7&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “An illegal immigrant from Mexico got pulled over this week in Ohio with a 15-year-old girl — who turned out to be a child sex slave from New Jersey, according to cops,” Chris Perez reports for the _[New York Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=564be0d17e&e=3ee4985eea)_. “State officials told reporters that Morales-Pedraza had been living in the US illegally and was previously deported.”
---
|
---
| “The number of Americans filing applications for unemployment benefits fell to more than a 49-1/2-year low last week, pointing to sustained strength in the economy,” _[Reuters](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c92fb8b065&e=3ee4985eea)_ reports. “Initial claims for state unemployment benefits dropped 5,000 to a seasonally adjusted 192,000 for the week ended April 13, the lowest level since September 1969, the Labor Department said on Thursday.”
---
|

Friend,
**April has been a busy month for Governor Holcomb.**

Governor Holcomb’s Next Level Agenda is advancing through the Indiana General Assembly. Working with our legislative leaders, we’re making progress toward Governor Holcomb’s goal of making a positive difference in the lives of Hoosiers across the state.

Here’s where Governor Holcomb’s priority legislation is so far as we approach the final days of session:

**Opioid Treatment**
**What’s it do?**
_Helps Hoosiers struggling with drug dependency have access to appropriate and professional treatment._

**Status?**
_Passed the legislature, heading to Governor Holcomb’s desk_
**Infant Mortality**
**What’s it do?**
_Ensures that more Hoosier babies reach their first birthdays by connecting women to prenatal and postnatal care and identifying substance abuse use disorder earlier in pregnancy._

**Status?**
_Passed the legislature, heading to Governor Holcomb’s desk_
**Exempting Military Pensions from State Income Tax**
**What’s it do?**
_Helps Indiana compete to attract these talented and well-rounded residents to contribute to our workforce and communities. Twenty other states have similar laws, including all of our neighbors._

**Status?**
_Bill is currently being considered by a legislative conference committee_
**Bias Crimes**
**What’s it do?**
_Puts Indiana on the map with 45 other states that have similar legislation on the books to protect citizens against crimes based on bias and ensures equal protection under the law._

**Status?**
_Passed the legislature, signed into law by Governor Holcomb_
**Workforce Development**
**What’s it do?**
_Doubles down on the Next Level Jobs initiative that is helping to develop Indiana’s skilled workforce and gives communities tools to develop local education-to-work pipelines. Removes barriers that make it harder for schools to partner directly with local Hoosier businesses on technical education._

**Status?**
_Bill is currently being considered by a legislative conference committee_
**Good Government**
**What’s it do?**
_Eliminates more than 150 state board and commission positions. Streamlines seven boards or commissions into existing boards. Allows variances in building projects to be granted at the speed of business. Allows EMS and fire safety officials to more easily stay active and keep their communities safe._

**Status?**
_Passed the legislature, heading to Governor Holcomb’s desk_
**School Safety**
**What’s it do?**
_Enacts the legislative recommendations from Governor Holcomb’s school safety report to make all of Indiana’s schools more safe and secure._

**Status?**
_Bill is currently being considered by a legislative conference committee_
It’s important issues like these -- helping our most vulnerable, growing our workforce, supporting our military, providing great government service and more -- that drive Governor Holcomb each and every day.

And with his strong leadership on these critical issues, we’ll cross the finish line of this legislative session with some big wins -- and real RESULTS -- for Hoosiers.

Thank you,
Holcomb Crew

body:

The Trump administration is trying _yet again_ to eliminate healthcare for millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions -- this time by throwing out the entire Affordable Care Act in the courts. For many Americans, access to healthcare is truly a matter of life or death. We can't wait on this. **I 'm asking for your help today to fight back and stop the Trump administration's attacks before it's too late.** **[Will you add your name now to tell the Trump administration to take their hands off our healthcare? name: Beto Organizing Team
subject: Mueller report released -- next steps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
The urgency of uniting a massive, grassroots movement to stop another Trump presidency and elect a new president who will protect democracy is clear. Direct voter contact is the best way to ensure we do not see another four years of Trump. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

#
Beto just traveled across New Hampshire as part of his trip to listen to Americans across the country -- but there is no way he can personally reach all of the voters we need to win this election. That means he needs your help now.
**With the Mueller report out yesterday, the urgency of uniting a massive, grassroots movement to stop another Trump presidency and elect a new president who will protect democracy is clear.**
We need more volunteers stepping up to talk to voters. Direct voter contact is the best way to ensure we do not see another four years of Trump. People need to hear about our vision for the country.
[**Add your name if you’re interested in knocking on doors and talking to voters in your neighborhood. We’ll provide all the support and info you need.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/canvass-for-beto/?source=ema20190419&t=1&akid=28073%2E444211%2EmUs--m)
The Mueller report paints a picture about what happened during the 2016 election and inside Trump’s White House: a repeated acceptance of help from a foreign power and then an effort to cover it up.
We need to build a united, unprecedented effort to elect a president who will protect our democracy and work as hard as humanly possible to represent all of us. That’s exactly what Beto will do. His politics and actions will never be defined by personal gain.
That’s why Beto is traveling night and day to talk to people everywhere. That’s why he’s refusing any money from PACs, corporations, and special interests. The only way we will overcome the threats to our democracy is if we build a movement by all of us, for all of us.
[**That means we have to talk to every voter. Can Beto count on you to help?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/canvass-for-beto/?source=ema20190419&t=2&akid=28073%2E444211%2EmUs--m)
Onward,
Team Beto
**[Contribute](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17006?source=ema20190419&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=28073%2E444211%2EmUs--m)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=28073%2E444211%2EmUs--m). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

| **_No Collusion...Again_** Four words: _No collusion, no obstruction._

Yesterday, the Department of Justice released the Mueller Report, and – just as we had been told weeks ago – it fully vindicates **President Donald J. Trump** against this charade of Russian collusion. The American people now know the truth: No one on the Trump campaign colluded with Russia, the president did not collude with Russia, and no American (period!) knowingly or willingly colluded with Russia.

Special Counsel Mueller was given unfettered access to campaign and White House documents, campaign and White House staff cooperated fully, and**President Trump** did not invoke executive privilege. But you won’t hear any of that from Democrats, who simply choose to live in fantasy land.

But, unfortunately, Democrats’ version of fantasy land is a little more sinister than something you’d find in a children’s novel. That’s because the Obama Administration was asleep at the wheel in handing Russia’s actions to interfere in our 2016 elections. Despite having two-years of advance knowledge, the Obama Administration failed to issue any meaningful response of strength to Russia’s cyber meddling.

With yesterday's news closing the book on this politically-motivated investigation against **President Trump** , it’s now time to focus on the real results that President Trump is delivering for the American people.

**PHOTO:** _**Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer** poses for a photo with **Congressman Larry Bucshon** and **Washington Mayor Joe Wellman** after delivering the keynote remarks to a packed house at the Daviess County Lincoln Day Dinner._
---
|
---
| | | **GOVERNOR HOLCOMB'S WEEK THAT WAS**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2f423ba834&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Governor Holcomb Recognized:
Tech Jobs & Fighting the Opioid Crisis_** In the last week, **Governor Eric Holcomb** was recognized not just once, but _TWICE_ , for his work to deliver results for Hoosiers on two of his main priorities – growing our economy and fighting the drug epidemic.

He was named the Trailblazer of the Year at Techpoint’s (Indiana’s technology initiative) Mira Awards gala over the weekend, and just yesterday he was awarded the Richard M. Fairbanks Circle of Hope Award by Fairbanks, a provider of addiction treatment and recovery programs across the state. **Techpoint Mira Awards Trailblazer of the Year**
This award recognizes visionaries who have a lasting and significant impact on the state’s tech community (and the thousands of high-paying tech jobs across our state). Read about his [contributions to the tech community here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1838929f2b&e=1acd9bb3d6) – including supporting venture capital, cybersecurity initiatives, computer science education and MORE – and check out [this video with several of Indiana’s tech leaders](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=01464d5a42&e=1acd9bb3d6) (linked above) telling the story of Governor Holcomb’s impact.

**Richard M. Fairbanks Circle of Hope Award** Presented annually, this award honors an individual who has made a major impact in the field of addiction. Yesterday, Fairbanks acknowledged **Governor Holcomb** for his actions to attack the drug crisis head-on and help Hoosiers recover through prevention, treatment and enforcement. [Watch as community leaders weigh in](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cddd161a44&e=1acd9bb3d6) regarding Governor Holcomb's common sense approach and strong leadership here – and find updates on [his Next Level Recovery initiative here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=131c0d09fa&e=1acd9bb3d6).

Way to go, **Governor Holcomb**!

| **_Lincoln Day Dinners:_**
_**16 Events in the Last Week!**_ What a week! Local Republican Parties across Indiana hosted 16 Lincoln Day Dinners over the last week, ranging from big events in:
* Lawrence, Ohio, Franklin, Gibson, Daviess, Clark counties in Southern Indiana
* Steuben, Blackford, White, Grant, Huntington, Howard counties in Northern Indiana
* Tippecanoe, Morgan, Vermillion, Hendricks counties in Central Indiana

These were very special Lincoln Day Dinners. White County hosted **NRA President Col. Oliver North** , and it was the largest Republican-only event he had ever participated in. Noble County had an essay content for local junior high and high school students with their Lincoln Day, asking them to contrast capitalism and socialism.

And that’s while our elected officials including**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch,** **Senator Todd Young,****Congressman Larry Bucshon, Congressman Trey Hollingsworth, Congressman Jim Banks, Auditor Tera Klutz, Senate President Pro Tempore Rod Bray, State Rep. Peggy Mayfield** and MORE spoke at these fantastic events.

And we’re not done yet! Check out the list of upcoming Lincoln Day Dinners below!

clean_body: Four words: No collusion, no obstruction. Today, the Department of Justice released the Mueller Report, and – just as we had been told weeks ago... | | | | | | http:// | No Collusion...Again Four words: No collusion, no obstruction. Yesterday, the Department of Justice released the Mueller Report, and – just as we had been told weeks ago – it fully vindicates President Donald J. Trump against this charade of Russian collusion. The American people now know the truth: No one on the Trump campaign colluded with Russia, the president did not collude with Russia, and no American (period!) knowingly or willingly colluded with Russia. Special Counsel Mueller was given unfettered access to campaign and White House documents, campaign and White House staff cooperated fully, andPresident Trump did not invoke executive privilege. But you won’t hear any of that from Democrats, who simply choose to live in fantasy land. But, unfortunately, Democrats’ version of fantasy land is a little more sinister than something you’d find in a children’s novel. That’s because the Obama Administration was asleep at the wheel in handing Russia’s actions to interfere in our 2016 elections. Despite having two-years of advance knowledge, the Obama Administration failed to issue any meaningful response of strength to Russia’s cyber meddling. | | The Mueller Report is out. _Sort of._ **A version of the report was released yesterday. It includes heavy redactions. Big sections have been blacked out by Attorney General William Barr and Donald Trump's Justice Department.** What we _do_ know: the Mueller Report is a shocking portrait of a president _obsessed_ with trying to derail an investigation into his conduct. It shows an extraordinary number of contacts between people in Trump's close orbit and Russians who attack America's democracy. And it shows that Barr, whose summary diverges wildly from the report itself, is an unreliable steward of the report and its contents. While all the facts are still coming out, the American people deserve the _whole_ report so we can read Mueller's conclusions for ourselves. **[No more distractions. No more secrets. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: One central question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We're fighting for a government and an economy that works for everyone. But none of us can get this done alone. It takes a grassroots movement where we fight side by side. | | |
---
My life's work has been around one central question: What's happening to hardworking people in America?

What's happening to hollow out America's middle class? Why has the road to economic security gotten so rocky and steep -- and even rockier and steeper for people of color?

Well, here's the answer: It wasn't an accident. It was because a series of decisions led to a change of who Washington actually works for.

We have a government that works fabulously for giant drug companies. It just doesn't work for people trying to fill a prescription.

We have a government that works terrifically for giant financial institutions. Just not for families trying to make it payday to payday and not get ripped off.

We have a government that works great for giant oil companies that want to drill everywhere. Just not for the rest of us who see climate change bearing down upon us.

**When you see a government that only works great for those with money and power -- for those who can hire armies of lobbyists and lawyers -- that's corruption, plain and simple, and we need to call it out.

So we're fighting for a government and an economy that works for everyone. But none of us can get this done alone. It takes a grassroots movement where we fight side by side.**

**[I don't sell my time to wealthy donors at private events, and I don't take any money from PACs or federal lobbyists. I'm deeply grateful that you're a part of this team -- can you make your first contribution today to help keep up the fight?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fc04/45c30650/b7e43892/66971f50/709502954/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNDE5ZW0xLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190419em1-full")**

No matter what issue pulls you into this fight, a government that works great for the rich and powerful is at the core of every problem we've got.

Student loans, health care, prescription drugs, a Green New Deal -- every decision made in Washington goes through the intersection of influence and money.

And until we change that, we'll have a government that works better and better for a thinner and thinner slice at the top and leaves everyone else behind.

So here's how I see this: We need to make change as a country. Not a nibble here, a piece over there. _Big, systemic change_. The kind of change that will make this government reflect the people again.

And that starts with ending the unwritten rule that presidential candidates have to spend their time begging the wealthy and well-connected for campaign contributions. I'm ready to build this with you. Are you in?

**Can you donate $3 or whatever you can spare to help build our grassroots movement for real, structural change? No matter what you give, you 'll be an equal member of the team:**

**[https://my.elizabethwarren.com/april-fundraising](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fc04/45c30650/b7e43892/66971f53/709502954/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiMjAxOTA0MTllbTEtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/april-fundraising?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190419em1-full")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| ****[**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fc04/45c30650/b7e43892/66971f50/709502954/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNDE5ZW0xLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190419em1-full")****

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
The House should initiate impeachment proceedings against the president of the United States. | | |
---
The Mueller report lays out facts showing that a hostile foreign government attacked our 2016 election to help Donald Trump and Donald Trump welcomed that help. Once elected, Donald Trump obstructed the investigation into that attack.

Mueller put the next step in the hands of Congress: "Congress has authority to prohibit a President's corrupt use of his authority in order to protect the integrity of the administration of justice." The correct process for exercising that authority is impeachment.

To ignore a president's repeated efforts to obstruct an investigation into his own disloyal behavior would inflict great and lasting damage on this country, and it would suggest that both the current and future presidents would be free to abuse their power in similar ways.

**The severity of this misconduct demands that elected officials in both parties set aside political considerations and do their constitutional duty. That means the House should initiate impeachment proceedings against the president of the United States.**

I want to make sure you know where I stand.

\-- Elizabeth

I want to make sure you know where I stand. \-- Elizabeth | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02116

body:
#
Peter,
First, Attorney General Barr tried to spin Special Counsel Mueller's findings with his four-page letter to Congress. Then, he tried again with his pre-report press conference.
Enough of his spin. The report is out and the person we need to hear from most is Special Counsel Mueller himself.
**[Add your name now to join me in calling for Special Counsel Mueller to testify before Congress.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4d42/42ab3cf4/7c183850/135d673b/2838378034/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://action.dickdurbin.com/page/s/call-on-mueller-to-testify-before-congress?source=em190419&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Here's what we know so far: the Mueller report outlines troubling contacts between Russia and the Trump campaign, as well as President Trump's attempts to interfere with the Special Counsel's investigation.
Now, the next step should be for Special Counsel Mueller to testify about his findings so that the American people can draw their own conclusions.
We cannot allow Attorney General Barr or President Trump to spin away Special Counsel Mueller's findings or sweep the truth under a rug.
**[Sign on now: call for Special Counsel Mueller to testify before Congress.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4d42/42ab3cf4/7c183850/135d673b/2838378034/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://action.dickdurbin.com/page/s/call-on-mueller-to-testify-before-congress?source=em190419&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Add My Name](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4d42/42ab3cf4/7c183850/135d673b/2838378034/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://action.dickdurbin.com/page/s/call-on-mueller-to-testify-before-congress?source=em190419&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
